column1: # Adapted from NVIDIA dcgm-exporter chart 4.8.1's etc/dcp-metrics-included.csv
# (Apache 2.0). Adds the 9 fields Convox GPU observability dashboards require
# which the chart's stock default-counters.csv leaves disabled or absent:
#     renamed from the deprecated alias in DCGM 4.x)
#     here to guarantee emission across chart versions)
# Chart 4.8.1's default-counters.csv exposes only 20 DCGM_FI_* fields;
# this override adds the 9 fields above plus the upstream profiling set.

column1: # CI guard: provider/k8s/dcgm_csv_test.go validates every field name here
# against a whitelist pinned to the chart version in
# Adding a new field requires a paired update in dcgm_csv_test.go's
# validDCGMFields map; CI fails fast on unrecognized / deprecated names.
